title: Moroccan Pilaf with Roasted Almonds
description: A flavorful and aromatic pilaf dish from Morocco, featuring roasted almonds and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the sliced almonds and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the arborio rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes, or until the rice is tender.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and stir in the chopped parsley.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
